item.title: Fiji-Sports-Council
item.description: The Fiji Sports Council has engaged two law firmsÂ to look into the financial investigation report of suspended CEO, Gilbert Vakalalabure and Manager of Operations, Lit
item.content:encoded: The Fiji Sports Council has engaged two law firmsÂ to look into the financial investigation report of suspended CEO, Gilbert Vakalalabure and Manager of Operations, Lit
